raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/Stores/Tas: Unsynced local_ task mutations skip backend calls that can only 404; the auto-refresh reload limit is clamped to the backend's 500 cap; and undo-restore re-creates a task with its full field set (source, category, tags, recurrence, goal/workstream, completion) instead of only description/dueAt/priority.
